'''''Stock Ships''''' is a sourcebook for [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]], describing fourteen [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighters]] for use in campaigns set in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] era. It was published by [[West End Games]] in December [[1997]].

Most of the ships presented had appeared in other West End Games sourcebooks. However, this sourcebook also included floor plans for each ship, and descriptions and game statistics for a modified example of each vessel.
